data.title: EverGen Infrastructure updates on debt refinancing and private placement, secured $13M for debt repayment.
data.description: EverGen Infrastructure Corp. in Vancouver, British Columbia, has shared updates on its debt refinancing and private placement efforts. In May 2025, the company signed a letter of intent for a $13 million asset level debt facility. This funding will help repay most of its corporate debt and comes with terms more suited to its current operations. EverGen is listed as EVGN on the TSXV and EVGIF on the OTCQB.

data.title: Visionary Holdings Inc. releases Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report, showcasing transformation and commercial progress in health sector.
data.description: Emphasizing the strategic transformation and initial commercial success within emerging health businesses, significant progress has been made with positive results. Key numbers reveal a notable growth in revenue, with an increase of X percent compared to the previous year. This growth is a testament to the effectiveness of the strategic changes implemented. Furthermore, market share has also seen a steady rise, reaching X percent, indicating a strengthening position in the competitive health industry. These achievements underscore the successful early advancements and the promising future outlook for the emerging health businesses.

data.title: Conflux (CFX) v3.0.2 testnet released, fixing critical RPC bugs. Includes eth_call coinbase bug, PoS rewards, developer endpoints.
data.description: The Conflux (CFX) Network has recently launched the v3.0.2 testnet upgrade, aimed at resolving the eth_call coinbase bug and PoS reward discrepancies. Additionally, this upgrade introduces new developer endpoints for eSpace. Developers can learn more about these updates on the network's website.

data.title: Innventure, Inc. sells $40 million in common stock to repay convertible debentures.
data.description: Innventure plans to use the funds raised from the offering to completely repay all of its outstanding convertible debentures. This move will involve a significant sum of money and represents a crucial step in the company's financial strategy. The offering is expected to have a substantial impact on the company's debt obligations, benefiting its overall financial health.

data.title: Infinix NOTE 50 Pro+, GT 30 Pro, HOT 60 Pro+ win 2025 European Product Design Award, showcasing brand's design success.
data.description: Three Infinix smartphones, namely the NOTE 50 Pro+, GT 30 Pro, and HOT 60 Pro+, have been honored with the 2025 European Product Design Award in recognition of their innovative design. This achievement underscores the brand's increasing impact in industrial design within the flagship, gaming, and slim, stylish smartphone categories. The awards serve as a testament to Infinix's commitment to excellence and creativity in the smartphone industry.

data.title: NYC token value plummets due to alleged liquidity extraction. Market cap decreases as withdrawals remain unexplained.
data.description: Data from blockchain records indicate unexplained withdrawals of liquidity as the market cap of Eric Adam’s NYC token continues to decrease.

data.title: Hanshow introduces NexShelf at NRF 2026, an intelligent shelf solution aiming to revolutionize retail with real-time data.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in New York, Hanshow, a prominent company in electronic shelf labels (ESLs) and digital retail solutions, introduced NexShelf, its latest innovative shelf solution at NRF 2026. NexShelf aims to revolutionize the shelf by converting it into a live data hub, offering cutting-edge features and technology to enhance the retail experience.

data.title: X Square Robot raises $140M in Series A++ funding from investors like ByteDance, marking a significant milestone.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, X Square Robot, a leader in general purpose embodied AI, successfully closed its Series A++ funding round, securing approximately US$140 million (equivalent to RMB 1 billion). This funding round garnered significant interest from top-tier investors globally, notably ByteDance.
